currentHeadline: The CTO-Agent starts in the terminal and builds its own first visible communication path.
currentIntro: This first homepage is a changeable bootstrap template. It is not fixed owner branding and not a final interface yet.
communicationNote: If this communication path is not good enough, tell the agent. It should be able to reshape the homepage through skill, template, and tooling.
terminalFallbackNote: The terminal layer always remains the primary and fully empowered fallback surface.
